title: Fix stuck Saving after calcTournament deleted in formula rewrite
description: After replacing calcTournament() with calcTournamentForType() in the Sept 2020 formula rewrite, persistTournament() still called the deleted function. This caused a silent JS error that left the save spinner stuck on 'Saving...' indefinitely and games never saved.

title: Auto-refresh USCF ratings on profile page load
description: Profile page stored a snapshot of ratings taken when the user last clicked 'Use as my profile'. The label said 'Live' but the value was stale. On every profile page visit, fetch current ratings from USCF member and sections APIs and persist the updated values.

title: Auto-save tournaments to server
description: Tournaments were only stored in browser memory and lost on refresh. Need to persist to server: create tournament record immediately on add (even with no games), then PATCH on every game change with 800ms debounce.

title: Multi-column impact analysis per rating type
description: Web calculator and mobile app now show one impact column per selected rating type rather than a single combined column. Web: renderGamesTable splits Impact header into labeled per-type columns (Standard, Quick, Blitz, FIDE) when multiple types are checked. Mobile PlayerScreen: ImpactTable dynamically builds columns for each type where both user and opponent have a rating. Also added Quick and Blitz manual rating inputs to My Ratings screen.
close_reason: Implemented in commits 3511529f (web calculator), e082a6a6 (mobile per-type columns), and 9019adb5 (Quick/Blitz manual inputs). Deployed to Fly.io and EAS production branch.

title: Split game attachment into photo and PGN buttons
description: Each game row now has two separate attachment buttons: 📷 for scoresheet photos (stores to photoUrls, opens camera/image picker directly) and 📄 for PGN notation files (stores to pgnUrls, opens .pgn/.txt picker). Pending rows also got attachment buttons, fixing the disappeared-button bug introduced when pending rows were added.
close_reason: Implemented in commit dc03c953. handleAttach(), openPhotoAttach(), openPgnFileAttach() added. Two hidden file inputs bypass the modal. Deployed to Fly.io.

title: Expandable game rows in tournament history modal
description: Clicking a tournament name in Load History expands an inline sub-table showing individual game results (round, opponent with USCF link, rating, W/L/D badge). Results cached per session.

title: Per-rating-type impact columns (web + mobile)
description: Show one impact column per selected rating type instead of a single combined column.\n\nWeb calculator: when a tournament has multiple types checked (e.g. Standard + FIDE), the Impact column splits into labeled per-type columns. Mobile PlayerScreen: ImpactTable dynamically builds columns for Standard, Quick, Blitz, and FIDE based on which ratings both the user and opponent have.
close_reason: Implemented across web calculator (renderGamesTable splits Impact header per type) and mobile PlayerScreen (ImpactTable dynamic columns). Deployed in commits 3511529f (web) and e082a6a6 (mobile).

title: Persist linked player profile in My Ratings screen across sessions
description:
The My Ratings screen stored only raw rating numbers, with no record of which player was linked via 'Use as my profile'. On app restart the numbers persisted but the player identity was lost, so there was no way to know whose profile was set or refresh it.

Now saves uscfId and name alongside rating numbers when 'Use as my profile' is tapped. My Ratings screen detects the linked player on focus, shows their name and live ratings in a card, and auto-refreshes from USCF API each session. Includes manual refresh button and a Clear option to unlink.
close_reason: Implemented and deployed via EAS update 3d15d4e8 (commit 4edd1087)

title: Add tournament setup modal with round pre-population and per-row opponent search
description:
When clicking Add Tournament, users had no way to specify how many rounds upfront or see all round slots at once. This made entering a completed tournament tedious — one game at a time with no structure.

Added a setup modal that appears when clicking Add Tournament. Modal lets users pick from featured/upcoming tournaments (quick-selects the name), choose rating type, and set number of rounds (1-9). When rounds are specified, the tournament card pre-populates with N editable pending rows — one per round — each with inline opponent search autocomplete, live USCF rating auto-fill on selection, and a result selector. Rating impact updates live as each row is filled in.

title: Implement correct USCF rating formulas per Sept 2020 spec
description: Calculator was using outdated formulas. Replaced with the correct US Chess Rating System (Sept 2020) implementation: Standard formula (N>8) uses K=800/(N*+m) and effective games N*=min(N, 50/sqrt(0.662+0.00000739*(2569-R)^2)). Bonus uses B=14 and threshold=14*sqrt(max(m,4)). Special formula (N<=8) uses the Provisional Winning Expectancy bisection method instead of K*(S-E). Formula boundary changed from N<26 to N<=8 for special formula.
close_reason: Shipped in commit f000bf91 on main

title: Allow manual override of live-fetched opponent rating
description: After selecting an opponent via player lookup, the rating input is pre-filled with their live rating. Users must be able to edit this value before adding the game. Bug: addGame() was ignoring manual edits when API had already populated the ratings map. Also added a blue-border hint and tooltip on the input after auto-fill to indicate editability.
close_reason: Shipped in commits 1ae463ed, 47ee26ae, a12ad6e2 on main

title: Per-type rating tracking for multi-type tournaments
description: Tournament rating calculator must use the correct rating type for each tournament: Quick tournaments use the player's live Quick rating, Blitz uses Blitz, FIDE uses FIDE rating. Multi-type tournaments (e.g. Standard+Quick, Standard+FIDE) run independent calculations per type. Profile card shows all four starting ratings (Standard, Quick, Blitz, FIDE). Breakdown and summary sections show labeled results per active rating type.
close_reason: Shipped in commits 1ae463ed, 47ee26ae, a12ad6e2 on main

title: Auto-fetch FIDE rating when FIDE checkbox is checked for opponent
description: When a tournament has the FIDE checkbox checked and an opponent is selected via player lookup, automatically fetch their FIDE standard rating from ratings.fide.com using their FIDE ID from the USCF member API. No manual FIDE entry needed.
close_reason: Shipped in commits 1ae463ed, 47ee26ae, a12ad6e2 on main

title: Tournament type selector with type-appropriate live ratings
description: When adding a tournament, prompt for type (Standard, Quick, Blitz, Standard+Quick, Standard+FIDE). Auto-fill opponent live ratings from the correct USCF/FIDE category. For dual-rated, show both ratings per opponent in the table.

title: Support half-point and full-point byes in tournament calculator
description: Players can receive byes (half-point requested, full-point from odd pairing). Need UI to add byes to tournament games list. Byes must be excluded from rating calculations per USCF rules.

title: Add per-game rating impact column to tournament table
description: Tournament table only showed opponent, rating, and result. Need a column showing K*(result-expected) per game so players can see exactly how each game affected their rating.

title: Fix opponent lookup to use live USCF rating in calculator
description: selectOpp() was using the monthly published rating when selecting opponents from search. Should always use the live post-event rating from the sections API so calculator results are accurate.

title: Show '>26' instead of '26' for established players in Prior Rated Games
description: Prior Rated Games field was hardcoded to '26' for established players, which is misleading. USCF API only returns gamesPlayed for provisional players. For established players show '>26' to indicate established status. Use Infinity internally so K-factor logic stays correct.

title: Rename rating labels to accurately reflect live vs monthly
description: Multiple labels incorrectly described ratings. Fixed: 'Rating' column in tournament table → 'Live Rating', 'USCF Regular Rating' in calculator → 'Live USCF Regular Rating'. Labels should match what the API actually returns (live post-event vs monthly published).

title: Allow users to add missing email or phone from My Profile page
description: Profile page only displayed existing contact info with no way to add it if missing. Users need to be able to add email and/or phone number directly from their profile without going through account settings.

title: Link opponent names to USCF MUIR profile page
description: Opponent names in tournament table were plain text. Should link to the new USCF MUIR player profile at ratings.uschess.org/player/{uscf_id} when a USCF ID is available from the lookup.
